page_metadata.biotools__summary: Compute biomolecular systems dynamics for user-uploaded structural coordinates or PDB identifiers, by integrating two widely used elastic network models (ENMs) – the Gaussian Network Model (GNM) and the Anisotropic Network Model (ANM).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Compute biomolecular systems dynamics for user-uploaded structural coordinates or PDB identifiers, by integrating two widely used elastic network models (ENMs) – the Gaussian Network Model (GNM) and the Anisotropic Network Model (ANM).
